facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 3,426 reviews. This is what they're all talking about.

JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay sits right on Bãi Khem, one of the cleanest stretches of sand on the island. Three pools. Five restaurants. A full spa. The architecture alone stops people mid-walk.

This isn't just a hotel. It's the reason some people come to Phu Quoc at all.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
